sources.title: PSA Announces $200 Million Infrastructure Investment to Support Global Demand
sources.claimLimit: Use for broad grading-demand growth, PSA capacity investment, and 2026 turnaround changes. Do not use as proof that One Piece exceeds Pokemon.

sources.title: Ahoy! PSA x Bandai Partner on Third Exclusive ONE PIECE Promo
sources.claimLimit: Use for PSA/Bandai partnership signal and the claim that the first PSA/Bandai Straw Hat promo became PSA's most-graded English ONE PIECE card.

sources.title: One Piece Collecting Basics Guide
sources.claimLimit: Use for franchise timeline, 2022 modern Bandai TCG launch, set-code basics, rarity, promos, and collecting concepts.

sources.title: Expanding BANDAI CARD GAMES for the Growing Global Market
sources.claimLimit: Use for Bandai ranking third in global TCG share as of March 2025, Japan TCG market size, and One Piece driving growth.

sources.title: Booster Pack - Carrying on His Will - OP-13
sources.publisher: One Piece Card Game official site
sources.claimLimit: Use for OP-13 theme, 3rd anniversary, Super Alt-Art, Red Super Alt-Art, WANTED cards, and relevant character lineup.

sources.title: Extra Booster - One Piece Heroines Edition - EB-03
sources.publisher: One Piece Card Game official site
sources.claimLimit: Use for EB-03 release date, MSRP, and rarity/product structure.

sources.title: Collect-a-Con Cape Town
sources.claimLimit: Search result and site surface indicate Cape Town event on June 6, 2026 at Fire and Ice Hotel, with trading cards, vendors, auctions, and collection-selling inquiry.

sources.title: About The Card Cache
sources.claimLimit: Use as Cape Town-based store signal for One Piece singles, sealed products, graded cards, and card selling.

sources.title: TCGXchange South Africa
sources.claimLimit: Use as Cape Town online TCG store signal. Page currently emphasizes Pokemon/MTG/Yu-Gi-Oh/Star Wars/Dragon Ball more than One Piece.

sources.title: Wizards Books and Games
sources.claimLimit: Use as local hobby-store channel to verify stock/events before buying or selling.

sources.title: Sell Your Trading Card Games to Millions
sources.claimLimit: Use for online seller-channel reach, listing tools, pricing tools, and trusted marketplace framing.

sources.title: Cardmarket One Piece
sources.claimLimit: Use for European One Piece marketplace signal, trend/best-seller surface, and cross-market comp checks.

sources.title: The eBay Vault pricing and fees
sources.claimLimit: Use for eBay Vault fee/fulfillment research before moving graded slabs.

explicitNonClaim: No final source pass verified the claim that One Piece grading volume recently exceeded Pokemon, so the video must phrase this as rising One Piece demand within a broad TCG/grading boom, not as a head-to-head volume win.
